definitions: n. 民意调查 (在此语境下的释义)

examples.text: Yet opinion polls suggest that many people nurture the belief that environmental standards are declining and four factors seem to cause this disjunction between perception and reality.
examples.explanation: 然而，民意调查显示，许多人认为环境标准正在下降，四个因素似乎导致了这种认知与现实之间的脱节。
